summary: Independent preview-only 1.0 release-readiness audit completed. No release blockers found. Package and schema versions are consistent, installer real writes remain disabled, and all 146 tests pass.

files_read.reason: worker skill and round artifact rules
JSON schema versions and worker skill content

files_changed.summary: Updated user-facing progress board for round 018 audit

commands_run.command: git diff HEAD -- pyproject.toml src/gpt2whatever/__init__.py src/gpt2whatever/cli.py src/gpt2whatever/core.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_core.py
commands_run.notes: Version bump, --version flag+test, skill content additions, no new write paths

commands_run.command: git diff HEAD -- docs/AGENT_CONTEXT.md docs/RELEASE_1_0_CHECKLIST.md docs/REPO_MAP.md README.md
commands_run.notes: Docs/metadata updates consistent with 1.0 preview-only strategy

acceptance.item: gpt2whatever --version behavior is covered by tests
JSON output schema versions remain version 1
acceptance.evidence: All three schema records in core.py still use "version": 1

acceptance.item: CLI real --install writes remain rejected without --dry-run
acceptance.evidence: cli.py returns 'Error: Real installation is not implemented yet. Use --install --dry-run to preview.'
Only build_install_dry_run_plan is called; no apply_install_action/apply_install_plan invoked

acceptance.item: No new code path applies install actions to current repo
acceptance.evidence: apply_install helpers are only tested, not called from CLI

risks.description: git emits LF->CRLF normalization warnings for many text files; this is not a whitespace error but may produce noisy commits on Windows.
risks.recommended_review: Consider normalizing line endings before commit if the project prefers LF.
